testsuite.name: org.spotifumtp37.delegate.SpotifUMUI_ESTest
testsuite.system-out:
*** SpotifUM *** 1 - Login as User 2 - Sign up as a new User 3 - Log in as Admin 0 - Exit Input your username:Input your password:Invalid credentials for User! Sign Up as a New User! Enter your desired username: Enter your desired password: Confirm your password: Enter your email address: Enter your address: Passwords do not match! Please retry signing up. Sign Up as a New User! Input your username:Input your password:Login successful! Redirecting to User Menu...
*** SpotifUM *** 1 - Listen to Music 2 - Manage Playlists 3 - Update Subscription 4 - Edit Profile 0 - Exit Sign Up as a New User! Enter your desired username: Enter your desired password: Confirm your password: Enter your email address: Enter your address: Account created successfully! You can now log in. Input admin username: Input admin password: Invalid admin credentials! Input admin username: Input admin password: Invalid admin credentials!
